name: Java 8 (New)
description: Measures knowledge of Java 8 including OOP, streams, lambda expressions, generics, and core APIs. For Java software developers.

name: Python (New)
description: Measures Python programming knowledge: data types, functions, OOP, standard libraries, iterators and comprehensions. For Python developers and data engineers.

name: SQL (New)
description: Assesses SQL skills including SELECT queries, JOINs, aggregations, subqueries, and data manipulation. For developers, analysts, and DBAs.

name: Microsoft SQL Server (New)
description: Assesses Microsoft SQL Server knowledge including T-SQL, stored procedures, indexing, and database administration.

name: Microsoft SQL Server 2014 Programming
description: Tests programming skills in Microsoft SQL Server 2014 including advanced T-SQL, query optimisation, and stored procedure development.

name: Spring Framework (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of the Spring Framework including Spring Boot, dependency injection, MVC, Spring Data, and Spring Security. For Java backend developers.

name: Programming Concepts
description: Measures core programming concepts such as algorithms, data structures, recursion, complexity, and object-oriented design. Language-agnostic. For software engineers and developers.

name: Data Warehousing Concepts
description: Assesses knowledge of data warehousing principles including ETL, dimensional modelling, star schemas, and OLAP. For data engineers and BI developers.

name: Amazon Web Services (AWS) Development (New)
description: Measures knowledge of AWS core services including EC2, S3, Lambda, IAM, RDS, and cloud architecture best practices.

name: Marketing (New)
description: Assesses marketing knowledge covering digital marketing, SEO, brand management, market research, and campaign analytics. For marketing professionals.

name: Verify - Following Instructions
description: Measures the ability to read and apply written instructions accurately. Relevant for roles requiring compliance with procedures, data entry, and rule-following.

name: Verify - Numerical Ability
description: Measures numerical reasoning ability: interpreting data tables, graphs, and statistics to draw conclusions. For roles requiring quantitative judgement.

name: Verify Interactive - Numerical Reasoning
description: Interactive numerical reasoning test with drag-and-drop responses. Assesses ability to work with statistical data, charts, and numerical problems under timed conditions.

name: Verify Interactive - General Ability (G+)
description: Combines verbal, numerical, and inductive reasoning into a single general ability test. Broad measure of cognitive potential suitable for professional and graduate roles.

name: Verify - Inductive Reasoning
description: Measures inductive reasoning: spotting patterns in sequences of figures to identify the underlying rule. Predicts ability to learn and solve novel problems.

name: Verify - Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures deductive reasoning ability: drawing logical conclusions from sets of premises. Relevant for analytical and problem-solving roles.

name: Verify Interactive - Deductive Reasoning
description: Interactive deductive reasoning test with scenario-based items. Assesses logical thinking and structured reasoning under timed conditions.

name: Verify Interactive - Numerical Calculation
description: Measures speed and accuracy in basic numerical calculations including arithmetic, percentages, and ratios. Suitable for clerical, financial, and operational roles.

name: Verify - Verbal Reasoning
description: Measures verbal reasoning ability: drawing conclusions from written passages. Relevant for roles requiring communication, critical reading, and written analysis.

name: Verify Interactive - Verbal Reasoning
description: Interactive verbal reasoning test. Assesses ability to evaluate written arguments and draw conclusions from complex text under timed conditions.

name: Verify - Numerical Reasoning (Graduate)
description: Graduate-level numerical reasoning test measuring data interpretation, statistical analysis, and quantitative problem-solving.

name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire (OPQ32r)
description: Measures 32 personality characteristics predicting work behaviour. Covers relationships with people, thinking styles, and feelings and emotions. Used for selection and development at all professional levels.

name: OPQ32 - Managerial Report
description: Personality questionnaire (OPQ32 basis) with a managerial focus, assessing leadership style, people management, and strategic thinking relevant to management and director roles.

name: Universal Competency Framework (UCF) Questionnaire
description: Behavioural questionnaire aligned to the SHL Universal Competency Framework measuring 20 competencies such as leading and deciding, supporting and cooperating, organising and executing.

name: Global Skills Assessment (GSA)
description: Comprehensive workplace skills assessment measuring 68 competencies across cognitive, interpersonal, and leadership domains. Used for broad talent profiling.

name: Motivation Questionnaire (MQ)
description: Assesses 18 dimensions of workplace motivation including achievement, affiliation, power, and security. Used to identify motivational fit for a role and organisation.

name: Customer Contact Styles Questionnaire (CCSQ)
description: Personality questionnaire focused on behaviours most relevant to customer-facing roles such as service, sales, and support. Measures empathy, resilience, and communication style.

name: Graduate Management Questionnaire (GMQ)
description: Designed for graduate and entry-level candidates entering management tracks. Measures potential for leadership, people management, and strategic thinking.

name: Sales Aptitude Profile
description: Measures personality traits and behaviours predictive of sales success including persuasiveness, resilience, drive, and customer focus. For sales and business development roles.

name: Team Roles Assessment
description: Identifies preferred team roles (coordinator, implementer, specialist, etc.) and how an individual contributes to team effectiveness. Used in team building and development.

name: Workplace English Test (WET)
description: Assesses English language competence in workplace contexts including reading comprehension, grammar, and vocabulary. For roles where English is the working language.

name: Financial Sector Situational Judgement Test
description: Situational judgement test for the financial services sector. Presents realistic workplace scenarios and measures judgement on compliance, client service, and ethical decision-making.

name: Management Situational Judgement Test
description: Presents realistic management scenarios and measures judgement on people management, prioritisation, and leadership decisions. For supervisory and management roles.

name: Customer Service Situational Judgement Test
description: Measures judgement in realistic customer service scenarios. Assesses how candidates handle difficult customers, escalations, and service recovery.

name: Graduate Situational Judgement Test
description: Situational judgement test designed for graduate-level candidates. Measures professional judgement in workplace scenarios covering ethics, teamwork, and communication.

name: Smart Interview Live
description: Structured digital interview with pre-set competency-based questions. Responses scored against validated competency benchmarks. Replaces phone screens for early selection.

name: Smart Interview On-Demand
description: Asynchronous video interview where candidates record responses to structured questions at a time of their choosing. Scored with AI-assisted rating.

name: Work Sample Simulation
description: Role-based simulation requiring candidates to complete tasks representative of the job such as inbox management, prioritisation exercises, and written communication. High validity for job performance.

name: Managerial Inbox Simulation
description: Simulates a manager's email inbox with time pressure. Measures prioritisation, decision-making, delegation, and written communication for management roles.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Assesses JavaScript knowledge including ES6+, DOM manipulation, async programming (promises, async/await), and common patterns. For frontend and full-stack developers.

name: React (New)
description: Measures knowledge of React including components, hooks, state management, context API, and React Router. For frontend developers.

name: Angular (New)
description: Assesses Angular framework knowledge including components, directives, services, dependency injection, and RxJS. For frontend and full-stack developers.

name: C# (New)
description: Measures C# programming knowledge including OOP, LINQ, async/await, generics, and .NET framework concepts. For .NET software developers.

name: .NET (New)
description: Assesses knowledge of the .NET platform including ASP.NET Core, Entity Framework, dependency injection, and web API development.

name: Node.js (New)
description: Tests Node.js knowledge covering event loop, Express.js, REST APIs, middleware, streams, and npm ecosystem. For backend and full-stack developers.

name: Kubernetes (New)
description: Assesses Kubernetes knowledge including pods, deployments, services, config maps, persistent volumes, and Helm. For DevOps and cloud engineers.

name: Docker (New)
description: Measures Docker knowledge including containers, images, Dockerfile authoring, Docker Compose, and container networking. For DevOps and software engineers.

name: Microsoft Azure Cloud (New)
description: Assesses Azure cloud knowledge including Azure services (Blob, Functions, AKS, CosmosDB), IAM, and cloud deployment patterns.

name: Data Science (New)
description: Measures data science knowledge including machine learning algorithms, model evaluation, feature engineering, statistics, and Python data libraries (pandas, sklearn, numpy).

name: Machine Learning (New)
description: Assesses machine learning concepts including supervised and unsupervised learning, neural networks, deep learning, model validation, and MLOps practices.

name: R (Statistical Programming)
description: Measures knowledge of R programming including data manipulation (dplyr, tidyr), visualisation (ggplot2), statistical modelling, and R Markdown. For data analysts and statisticians.

name: Git (New)
description: Assesses Git version control knowledge including branching, merging, rebasing, pull requests, and collaborative workflows. For software developers.

name: Financial Accounting (New)
description: Tests financial accounting knowledge including P&L, balance sheets, cash flow, GAAP principles, and financial ratios. For finance and accounting roles.

name: Business Analysis (New)
description: Assesses business analysis competencies including requirements gathering, process mapping, stakeholder management, and BPMN. For business analysts.

name: Project Management (New)
description: Measures project management knowledge covering planning, scheduling, risk management, PRINCE2, PMI/PMBOK methodology, and agile practices. For project managers.

name: Agile and Scrum (New)
description: Tests knowledge of Agile principles, Scrum ceremonies, sprint planning, retrospectives, Kanban, and scaled agile frameworks. For developers, QA, and project managers.

name: Software QA and Testing
description: Measures software testing knowledge including test planning, manual testing, automated testing (Selenium), bug tracking, and ISTQB concepts. For QA engineers and testers.

name: Salesforce (New)
description: Assesses Salesforce platform knowledge including CRM configuration, Apex development, SOQL, workflow automation, and Salesforce Lightning. For Salesforce admins and developers.

name: Cybersecurity Fundamentals
description: Tests core cybersecurity knowledge including network security, encryption, threat modelling, penetration testing concepts, and security compliance frameworks.

name: DevOps (New)
description: Measures DevOps knowledge including CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code (Terraform, Ansible), monitoring, containerisation, and site reliability practices.

name: Tableau (New)
description: Assesses Tableau data visualisation skills including calculated fields, dashboards, data blending, and Tableau Server administration.

name: Power BI (New)
description: Tests Power BI knowledge including DAX, data modelling, report building, Power Query, and Power BI Service deployment.

name: Critical Reasoning Test Battery (CRTB)
description: Combination of verbal, numerical, and diagrammatic reasoning. Used for senior professional, management, and graduate roles requiring complex analytical thinking.

name: Management and Leadership Styles Inventory (MLQ)
description: Measures preferred management and leadership styles including transformational, transactional, and laissez-faire approaches. For existing and aspiring managers.

name: Emotional Intelligence Assessment
description: Measures emotional intelligence across self-awareness, self-regulation, empathy, motivation, and social skills. Relevant for leadership, HR, and client-facing roles.

name: Resilience Questionnaire
description: Assesses resilience and ability to cope with workplace stress, setbacks, and change. Used for high-pressure roles in customer service, healthcare, and emergency services.

name: Strategic Thinking Profile
description: Measures the capacity for strategic thinking including visioning, pattern recognition, systems thinking, and long-term planning. For senior management and executive roles.

name: Numeric Skills Test
description: Assesses basic numerical skills including arithmetic, percentages, fractions, and simple data interpretation. For clerical, administrative, and entry-level roles.

name: Mechanical Comprehension Test
description: Measures understanding of mechanical and physical principles such as levers, pulleys, gears, and circuits. For technical, engineering, and trades roles.

name: Spatial Reasoning Test
description: Assesses ability to mentally visualise and manipulate 2D and 3D shapes. Relevant for engineering, architecture, and design roles.

name: Abstract Reasoning Test
description: Measures non-verbal reasoning ability through pattern recognition in abstract shapes. Assesses fluid intelligence and the ability to handle novel information.

name: Administrative Skills Test
description: Tests practical administrative competencies including filing, scheduling, correspondence, data entry accuracy, and office procedures. For administrative and PA roles.

name: C++ (New)
description: Assesses C++ programming skills including pointers, memory management, STL, templates, and object-oriented design. For systems and embedded software developers.

name: Go (Golang) (New)
description: Measures Go programming knowledge including goroutines, channels, interfaces, error handling, and standard library. For backend and systems developers.

name: Scala (New)
description: Tests Scala knowledge including functional programming, case classes, pattern matching, Akka, and Spark integration. For data engineers and backend developers.

name: Linux System Administration
description: Assesses Linux administration skills including file systems, user management, shell scripting, process management, and networking. For DevOps and systems engineers.

name: Networking Fundamentals
description: Tests networking knowledge including TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP, firewalls, load balancers, VPNs, and network troubleshooting. For network and cloud engineers.

name: Microsoft Excel (New)
description: Measures Excel proficiency including formulas, pivot tables, VLOOKUP, macros, data validation, and advanced charting. For analysts, finance, and operations roles.

name: HR Management (New)
description: Tests HR knowledge covering recruitment, employment law, performance management, L&D, compensation, and employee relations. For HR professionals.

name: Supply Chain Management
description: Assesses supply chain knowledge including procurement, logistics, inventory management, demand planning, and supplier relations. For supply chain and operations roles.
